## Paper Notes
- [Paper Notes](http://localhost:1313/paper-notes/index.md): Reading notes on papers about distributed systems, computer networks, storage systems, cloud computing, and operating systems.

- [Empowering_Azure_Storage_with_RDMA](http://localhost:1313/paper-notes/empowering_azure_storage_with_rdma/index.md): Given the wide adoption of disaggregated storage in public clouds, networking is the key to enabling high performance and high reliability in a cloud storage service. In Azure, we choose Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) as our transport and aim to enable it for both storage frontend traffic (between compute virtual machines and storage clusters) and backend traffic (within a storage cluster) to fully realize its benefits. As compute and storage clusters may be located in different datacenters within an Azure region, we need to support RDMA at regional scale
- [Example Paper Note](http://localhost:1313/paper-notes/example_note/index.md): Test
